recipe.solutionCode:
from pathlib import Path
import base64
import runpy

_FILES = {
    'main.py': 'ZnJvbSBtb2RlbHMuaXRlbSBpbXBvcnQgSXRlbQoKaXRlbSA9IEl0ZW0oIm5vdGVib29rIiwgMykKcHJpbnQoZiJ7aXRlbS5uYW1lfToge2l0ZW0ucXVhbnRpdHl9IikK',
    'models/item.py': 'Y2xhc3MgSXRlbToKICAgIGRlZiBfX2luaXRfXyhzZWxmLCBuYW1lLCBxdWFudGl0eSk6CiAgICAgICAgc2VsZi5uYW1lID0gbmFtZQogICAgICAgIHNlbGYucXVhbnRpdHkgPSBxdWFudGl0eQo=',
    'models/__init__.py': '',
}

for _path, _data in _FILES.items():
    _file = Path(_path)
    _file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    _file.write_text(base64.b64decode(_data).decode('utf-8'), encoding='utf-8')

runpy.run_path('main.py', run_name="__main__")

recipe.solutionCode:
from pathlib import Path
import base64
import runpy

_FILES = {
    'main.py': 'ZnJvbSBtb2RlbHMuZ3JhZGVfcmVzdWx0IGltcG9ydCBHcmFkZVJlc3VsdAoKcmVzdWx0ID0gR3JhZGVSZXN1bHQoIlNhbSIsIDg0KQpwcmludChyZXN1bHQuc3VtbWFyeSgpKQpwcmludChyZXN1bHQuaXNfcGFzc2luZygpKQo=',
    'models/grade_result.py': '',
    'models/__init__.py': '',
}

for _path, _data in _FILES.items():
    _file = Path(_path)
    _file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    _file.write_text(base64.b64decode(_data).decode('utf-8'), encoding='utf-8')

runpy.run_path('main.py', run_name="__main__")
